description: Implement ARIA roles and keyboard support for the course catalog and enrollment flow to enable navigation for visually impaired users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a visually impaired user WHEN they navigate the course catalog THEN they can access all course cards and complete the enrollment flow using a screen reader.

description: Add closed captions, transcripts, and keyboard controls to the video player to support deaf, hard-of-hearing, and motor-impaired users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with hearing or motor impairments WHEN they use the video player THEN they can access captions, transcripts, and control the video using keyboard shortcuts.

description: Revise UI components to meet WCAG AA contrast ratios across all text elements to enhance accessibility for visually impaired users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with visual impairments WHEN they view UI components THEN all text elements meet WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text).

description: Make quiz forms accessible to assistive technologies by using semantic HTML elements and ensuring error messages are conveyed textually.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with disabilities WHEN they access quiz forms THEN they can interact with all elements using assistive technologies and receive clear error messages.

description: Establish a testing and QA process to ensure all new features meet accessibility standards before deployment.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a new feature is developed WHEN it is tested THEN it meets all relevant accessibility standards before being deployed.

description: Implement a monitoring system to track WCAG violations in real-time and ensure timely remediation.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a monitoring system is in place WHEN a new WCAG violation occurs THEN the system alerts the team for immediate action.

description: Conduct a full accessibility audit, create a VPAT, and publish an accessibility statement to meet compliance requirements for prospective clients.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a completed accessibility audit WHEN the VPAT is created THEN it accurately reflects compliance with WCAG 2.1 AA standards and is published on the marketing site.

description: Implement a mechanism to gather qualitative user feedback on accessibility features to better understand user needs and improve the platform.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user feedback mechanism WHEN users provide feedback THEN the platform collects and analyzes responses to identify accessibility improvement areas.

description: Conduct A/B testing on different implementations of accessibility features to determine which changes yield the highest improvements in task completion rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN A/B tests are conducted WHEN results are analyzed THEN the most effective accessibility features are identified for implementation.

description: Create comprehensive documentation of all accessibility features and improvements made to the platform for transparency and user guidance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN documentation is created WHEN users access it THEN they can easily understand and utilize the accessibility features.
